title: Lesson 143: 教室, 兄弟, 去年...

items.gloss: classroom; department; laboratory; single-room school; small school
siblings; brothers and sisters; brothers; siblings-in-law; brothers-in-law; sisters-in-law; mate; friend
disliked; hated; disagreeable; tendency; smack (of); touch (of); distinction; discrimination

to cut; to cut through; to perform (surgery); to sever (connections, ties); to turn off (e.g. the light); to terminate (e.g. a conversation); to hang up (the phone); to disconnect; to punch (a ticket); to tear off (a stub); to open (something sealed); to start; to set (a limit); to do (something) in less or within a certain time; to issue (cheques, vouchers, etc.); to reduce; to decrease; to discount; to shake off (water, etc.); to let drip-dry; to let drain; to cross; to traverse; to criticize sharply; to act decisively; to do (something noticeable); to go first; to make (certain facial expressions, in kabuki); to turn (vehicle, steering wheel, etc.); to curl (a ball); to bend; to shuffle (cards); to discard a tile; to dismiss; to sack; to let go; to expulse; to excommunicate; to dig (a groove); to cut (a stencil, on a mimeograph); to trump; to cut (the connection between two groups) (in go); to start a fire (with wood-wood friction or by striking a metal against stone); to draw (a shape) in the air (with a sword, etc.); to finish; to complete
to wear (in modern Japanese, from the shoulders down); to put on; to bear (guilt, etc.)
